Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-23 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker Dashboard Today's data reveals two exceptional performers dominating the short-term momentum rankings. PL (platinum futures) ranks #1 with a composite score of 95.3, driven by extraordinary 1-year returns of 708.25% and perfect alignment across all four moving average gates (SMA 30/50/100/200), though its momentum_signal of 3.58 flags it as "overextended" despite stellar ratio consistency (4 of 5 ratio passes). TNGX shows even more extreme returns at 991.57% over the year with perfect ratio passes (5 of 5), but its much lower 1-day return of 0.05% combined with a tiny vs_spy outperformance over 1 week (10.31%) suggests momentum may be decelerating after a massive run. Both tickers pass all SMA gates and significantly outpace SPY and QQQ over longer timeframes, but PL's superior bad_spy_score of 2.8 indicates it held up better during market downturns compared to TNGX's score of 0.38, signaling PL has more resilient underlying momentum characteristics.
